{"path": "auth_api/main.py", "file_text": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.security import OAuth2PasswordRequestForm
from jose import jwt
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from auth_api.models import USERS
from auth_api.routes.users import router as users_router
from auth_api.auth import SECRET_KEY, ALGORITHM

app = FastAPI()

app.include_router(users_router)

@app.post("/auth/login")
async def login(form_data: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm = Depends()):
    user = next((u for u in USERS if u.username == form_data.username), None)
    if not user or user.password != form_data.password:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
            detail="Incorrect username or password",
        )
    
    expire = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(minutes=30)
    to_encode = {"sub": user.username, "exp": expire}
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)
    
    return {"access_token": encoded_jwt, "token_type": "bearer"}
", "command": "create"}

args.file_text:
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List

class User(BaseModel):
    id: int
    username: str
    password: str
    email: str

class UserOut(BaseModel):
    id: int
    username: str
    email: str

USERS: List[User] = [
    User(id=1, username="alice", password="password123", email="alice@example.com"),
    User(id=2, username="bob", password="password456", email="bob@example.com"),
    User(id=3, username="charlie", password="password789", email="charlie@example.com"),
]
